name: builtwith-technographic-leads
description: Extract website technologies and historical usage from BuiltWith to support sales qualification and competitor displacement plays.
business_value: Technographic account scoring and targeted outbound segmentation.

pagination.note: Domain lookup returns grouped technology records.

verification_result: Example fixture validates technology lead rows with current/historical usage fields.
known_risks: Technology detection may lag current site changes.
Technographic fit is a signal and should be combined with firmographic context.
